title: Daewoo Argyle Collection, Toaster 2 Slice With Defrost, Reheat And Browning Control To Use At Your Convenience, While The Removable Crumb Tray Makes Cleaning Quick, Black
features: Sleek Textured Design for Stylish Kitchens: Elevate your kitchen with the Daewoo Argyle toaster, featuring a unique zigzag textured finish. A compact and chic design that blends beautifully into any modern or traditional kitchen setup

Toast from Frozen or Reheat in Seconds: Integrated Defrost and Reheat functions give you full control over your toast. Warm up previously toasted bread or toast directly from frozen — no more soggy or cold slices
Customised Toasting with 7 Browning Settings: Whether you prefer lightly toasted or golden crisp, the adjustable 7-level browning dial ensures your toast is exactly how you like it, every single time
Easy Cleaning with Slide-Out Crumb Tray: No more mess on your countertops. The removable crumb tray slides out for fast, fuss-free cleaning, keeping your kitchen neat and hygienic
High-Lift Lever for Smaller Slices: Avoid burnt fingers with the high-lift function – safely retrieve smaller pieces of bread, crumpets or bagels with ease

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎2 Slice toaster, Cancel option, Reheat option, Defrost option, 7 Browning settings, High lift lever, Self-centering, Anti-jam function, LED light, Removable crumb tray, Cord storage, Part of a collection for mix and match, Wide colour range
